creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
danfe@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Synopsis: [patch] x11/nvidia-driver: add linux symlink for vdpau_wrapper.cfg
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: danfe
> State-Changed-When: Tue Dec 4 08:29:12 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Close at submitter's request.

No, vdpau_wrapper.cfg issue is still valid. A number of linux- ports
already provide symlinks:

  audio/linux-f10-alsa-lib
  net/linux-f10-openldap
  x11-fonts/linux-f10-fontconfig
  x11-themes/linux-f10-hicolor-icon-theme

I was only wrong in assuming linux_base handles them. It's actually
decided case by case.

Anyway, have you tried to reproduce "How-To-Repeat"?
